forbidden-city.label: Southern Gate — The Meridian Gate (Wumen 午门)
forbidden-city.caption: The Meridian Gate (午門, Wǔmén) is the southern entrance and ceremonial threshold of the Forbidden City. Five arched passageways pierce the U-shaped tower: the central gate was reserved for the Emperor alone. Its name aligns it symbolically with the celestial meridian — the axis that divides east from west.

forbidden-city.label: Northern Gate — Gate of Divine Might (Shenwumen 神武门)
